title: Military Occupational Specialty catalog — all branches

entries.title: Infantryman
entries.duties: Close with and destroy the enemy; rifle marksmanship; fire and maneuver; patrols; battle drills; land navigation; maintain weapons and equipment.
entries.assist: I can fill in on battle drills, OPORD skeleton, range cards, patrol planning, SALUTE reports, and squad-level tactics — bridged to combat and warfare doctrine.

entries.title: Indirect Fire Infantryman
entries.duties: Mortar squad operations; fire direction; ammunition; coordinate indirect fires with maneuver.
entries.assist: Assist with mortar gunnery fundamentals, fire direction basics, ammunition accounting, and coordination with FIST/Fires — educational only.

entries.title: Combat Engineer
entries.duties: Mobility, counter-mobility, survivability; breach; obstacle emplacement; route clearance; demolitions supervision.
entries.assist: Fill in on obstacle theory, route clearance checklists, engineer estimates, and bridge to engineering chamber for structural/mechanical depth.

entries.title: Horizontal Construction Engineer
entries.duties: Operate heavy engineer equipment; horizontal construction; road maintenance; airfield repair support.
entries.assist: Assist with equipment PMCS concepts, grading principles, and construction sequencing — engineering chamber for mechanics.

entries.title: Cannon Crewmember
entries.duties: Operate cannon weapon systems; ammunition handling; fire missions; maintenance of artillery systems.
entries.assist: Assist with artillery crew duties, ammunition types overview, fire mission vocabulary — not live fire control orders.

entries.title: Fire Support Specialist
entries.duties: Call for fire; target location; coordinate fires; maintain fire support equipment and communications.
entries.assist: Fill in on call-for-fire vocabulary, target location methods, and fires coordination — educational, not live mission auth.

entries.title: PATRIOT Fire Control Enhanced Operator
entries.duties: Operate PATRIOT fire control systems; air defense engagement procedures; system maintenance.
entries.assist: Assist with air defense role overview, crew coordination concepts, and systems vocabulary — unclassified educational.

entries.title: UH-60 Helicopter Repairer
entries.duties: Maintain UH-60 systems; troubleshoot; replace components per TM; support flight operations.
entries.assist: Fill in on aviation maintenance workflow, TM reading habits, and turn-in standards — engineering for mechanical systems.

entries.title: CH-47 Helicopter Repairer
entries.duties: CH-47 maintenance; powertrain and airframe systems; support aviation unit readiness.
entries.assist: Assist with Chinook maintainer duties and readiness reporting concepts.

entries.title: Cyber Operations Specialist
entries.duties: Cyberspace operations; defensive and offensive cyber; network analysis; tool employment per authority.
entries.assist: Fill in on cyber ops vocabulary, incident response workflow, and programming chamber for stack/script assist — lawful authority only.

entries.title: Cavalry Scout
entries.duties: Reconnaissance and security; scout vehicle operations; report enemy activity; screen and guard.
entries.assist: Assist with reconnaissance reporting, route recon checklists, and security operations vocabulary.

entries.title: Information Technology Specialist
entries.duties: Install and maintain networks; servers; user support; COMSEC handling per policy.
entries.assist: I fill in as 25B — troubleshooting trees, network basics, ticketing, and NEXUS stack ops via programming chamber.

entries.title: Signal Support Systems Specialist
entries.duties: Maintain signal equipment; radio systems; retrans; troubleshoot communications links.
entries.assist: Assist with signal maintainer PMCS, radio fundamentals, and comms troubleshooting methodology.

entries.title: Military Police
entries.duties: Law enforcement; area security; circulation control; detainee operations per LOAC and policy.
entries.assist: Fill in on MP patrol procedures, report writing, evidence preservation basics, and LOAC education via warfare corpus.

entries.title: Intelligence Analyst
entries.duties: Analyze intelligence; produce intel products; brief commanders; maintain intel databases.
entries.assist: Assist with analytic writing, source evaluation basics, and intel product structure — unclassified educational.

entries.title: Human Intelligence Collector
entries.duties: Human intelligence collection per LOAC, policy, and training; source operations.
entries.assist: Educational overview of HUMINT roles and legal/policy constraints — not operational collection orders.

entries.title: Financial Management Technician
entries.duties: Financial transactions; pay support; accounting; travel vouchers; audit support.
entries.assist: Fill in on voucher processing workflow, finance office procedures, and reconciliation checklists.

entries.title: Human Resources Specialist
entries.duties: Personnel actions; records; strength management; orders; HR support to command.
entries.assist: Assist with personnel action checklists, HR systems vocabulary, and S1 shop workflow.

entries.title: Public Affairs Mass Communication Specialist
entries.duties: Public affairs content; media engagement; command messaging; community relations.
entries.assist: Fill in on PA writing, release coordination, and crisis communication basics.

entries.title: Religious Affairs Specialist
entries.duties: Support chaplain programs; religious support coordination; administrative religious affairs.
entries.assist: Assist with religious support logistics and administrative coordination — not pastoral authority.

entries.title: Combat Medic Specialist
entries.duties: Emergency medical treatment; TCCC; evac coordination; maintain medical equipment and supplies.
entries.assist: I fill in as 68W — TCCC phases overview, MARCH/PAWS, 9-line MEDEVAC format — educational, not personal medical advice; biology/medical bridge.

entries.title: Medical Laboratory Specialist
entries.duties: Clinical laboratory testing; sample processing; equipment maintenance; quality control.
entries.assist: Assist with lab workflow, sample chain-of-custody basics, and QC concepts — biology bridge.

entries.title: Chemical, Biological, Radiological, Nuclear Specialist
entries.duties: CBRN recon; decontamination; warning and reporting; protective measures.
entries.assist: Fill in on CBRN vocabulary, MOPP concepts, and decon priorities — educational safety doctrine.

entries.title: Motor Transport Operator
entries.duties: Operate tactical vehicles; convoy operations; vehicle PMCS; cargo transport.
entries.assist: Assist with convoy brief elements, PMCS checklists, and motor pool workflow.

entries.title: Wheeled Vehicle Mechanic
entries.duties: Diagnose and repair wheeled vehicles; PMCS; parts ordering; maintenance records.
entries.assist: Fill in as 91B — fault isolation trees, maintenance management, engineering for mechanical depth.

entries.title: Tactical Power Generation Specialist
entries.duties: Install and maintain tactical generators and electrical distribution.
entries.assist: Assist with generator PMCS, load planning basics, and electrical safety — engineering chamber.

entries.title: Unit Supply Specialist
entries.duties: Supply accounting; property book; hand receipts; issue and turn-in; inventories.
entries.assist: Fill in on supply procedures, inventory cycles, and hand receipt fundamentals.

entries.title: Radio and Communications Security Repairer
entries.duties: Repair COMSEC and signal equipment; zeroize procedures per policy; maintenance records.
entries.assist: Assist with signal maintainer workflows and COMSEC vocabulary — policy-bound educational.

entries.title: Boatswain's Mate
entries.duties: Deck seamanship; mooring; small boat ops; deck maintenance; underway replenishment support.
entries.assist: Fill in on seamanship vocabulary, deck evolution coordination, and Navy surface ops basics.

entries.title: Electronics Technician
entries.duties: Maintain electronic systems; radar; communications; troubleshoot to component level.
entries.assist: Assist as ET — fault isolation, electronics theory via engineering chamber, maintenance docs.

entries.title: Hospital Corpsman
entries.duties: Clinical and field medical support; TCCC with Marines; sick call; preventive medicine support.
entries.assist: I fill in as HM — corpsman duties, TCCC, sick call workflow — biology/medical bridge; not personal medical advice.

entries.title: Information Systems Technician
entries.duties: Network administration; servers; cybersecurity support; user services afloat and ashore.
entries.assist: Fill in as Navy IT — network ops, troubleshooting, programming/NEXUS stack assist.

entries.title: Machinist's Mate
entries.duties: Operate and maintain propulsion and auxiliary machinery; engineering watches.
entries.assist: Assist with engineering watchstanding concepts, machinery systems overview — engineering chamber.

entries.title: Operations Specialist
entries.duties: Track surface/air contacts; CIC operations; plot tactical picture; assist warfare coordination.
entries.assist: Fill in on CIC vocabulary, contact reporting, and maritime ops picture — warfare bridge.

entries.title: Quartermaster
entries.duties: Navigation; charts; celestial and electronic nav; logbooks; watch coordination.
entries.assist: Assist with navigation fundamentals, passage planning outline, and chart vocabulary.

entries.title: Master-at-Arms
entries.duties: Law enforcement; antiterrorism; force protection; investigations support.
entries.assist: Fill in as MA — security patrol concepts, AT/FP vocabulary, LOAC via warfare corpus.

entries.title: Cryptologic Technician Networks
entries.duties: Cyber network operations; defensive cyber; analysis per authority and policy.
entries.assist: Assist with cyber network ops workflow and programming chamber depth — lawful scope only.

entries.title: Storekeeper / Logistics Specialist
entries.duties: Supply and logistics accounting; requisitions; inventory; material movement.
entries.assist: Fill in on Navy supply procedures and inventory management basics.

entries.title: Rifleman
entries.duties: Rifle squad operations; fire and maneuver; patrols; amphibious assault support.
entries.assist: I fill in as 0311 — Marine infantry battle drills, patrol planning, combat chamber depth.

entries.title: Field Radio Operator
entries.duties: Tactical communications; radio nets; antenna setup; troubleshoot field comms.
entries.assist: Assist as 0621 — field radio procedures, net discipline, signal troubleshooting.

entries.title: Fire Support Marine
entries.duties: Call for fire; target acquisition; coordinate supporting arms for Marine units.
entries.assist: Fill in on Marine fires coordination and call-for-fire vocabulary — educational.

entries.title: Small Arms Repairer/Technician
entries.duties: Maintain small arms; armorers bench; parts; weapons readiness.
entries.assist: Assist with armorer workflow, weapons PMCS concepts — educational maintenance only.

entries.title: Supply Administration and Operations Specialist
entries.duties: Supply administration; requisitions; equipment accountability; S4 shop support.
entries.assist: Fill in on Marine supply admin and property accountability procedures.

entries.title: Motor Vehicle Operator
entries.duties: Operate tactical vehicles; convoy ops; PMCS; motor transport support.
entries.assist: Assist with convoy operations and motor transport procedures.

entries.title: Military Police
entries.duties: Law enforcement; base security; route security; detainee handling per LOAC.
entries.assist: Fill in as Marine MP — patrol, reports, LOAC education via warfare bridge.

entries.title: Operations Intelligence
entries.duties: Produce intelligence for air operations; brief aircrews; fusion; threat analysis.
entries.assist: Assist with intel product structure and air-centric threat analysis vocabulary.

entries.title: Fighter Aircraft Integrated Avionics
entries.duties: Maintain fighter avionics; troubleshoot; test equipment; flight line support.
entries.assist: Fill in on avionics maintainer workflow and electronics via engineering chamber.

entries.title: Cyber Transport Systems
entries.duties: Install/maintain network infrastructure; cyber transport; systems administration.
entries.assist: I fill in as 3D1X2 — network build, troubleshooting, programming chamber for automation.

entries.title: Aerospace Medical Service
entries.duties: Patient care support; aeromedical evacuation assist; clinic operations.
entries.assist: Assist with aerospace medical tech duties — biology/medical bridge; educational only.

entries.title: Flight Engineer
entries.duties: Aircrew flight engineer duties; systems monitoring; emergency procedures per aircraft.
entries.assist: Educational overview of flight engineer role and crew coordination — not aircrew orders.

entries.title: Command and Control Systems Operations
entries.duties: Space C2 systems; satellite ops support; crew coordination per authority.
entries.assist: Assist with space C2 vocabulary and ops floor procedures — unclassified educational.

entries.title: Safety
entries.duties: Safety programs; mishap prevention; inspections; reporting.
entries.assist: Fill in on safety program management and mishap reporting workflow.

entries.title: Maritime Enforcement Specialist
entries.duties: Maritime law enforcement; boarding; drug interdiction support; LE authority per USCG mission.
entries.assist: Assist with maritime LE vocabulary and boarding safety concepts — educational.

entries.title: Machinery Technician
entries.duties: Maintain cutter machinery; engineering plant; auxiliary systems.
entries.assist: Fill in as MK — engineering plant watch and maintainer duties via engineering chamber.

entries.title: Operations Specialist (Coast Guard)
entries.duties: Cutter operations; SAR coordination; law enforcement mission support.
entries.assist: Assist with Coast Guard ops floor vocabulary and SAR coordination basics.

entries.title: Special Forces (18 Series overview)
entries.duties: Unconventional warfare; foreign internal defense; special reconnaissance; direct action per mission and authority.
entries.assist: Educational overview of SF team roles and UW vocabulary — not operational mission orders.

entries.title: CMF 11 — Infantry Branch (general)
entries.duties: Infantry branch: close combat, rifle squads, patrols, light and mechanized infantry roles across 11-series MOS.
entries.assist: When MOS code is unclear within CMF 11, I assist as infantry — battle drills, land nav, weapons maintenance.

entries.title: CMF 68 — Medical Branch (general)
entries.duties: Army medical CMF: medics, nurses, lab, dental, pharmacy, evacuation — patient care and medical readiness.
entries.assist: Fill in for any 68-series — clinical workflow, medical logistics, TCCC where applicable.

entries.title: CMF 25 — Signal Branch (general)
entries.duties: Signal Corps: networks, radios, cyber, EW support — communications for maneuver units.
entries.assist: Assist any 25-series — comms troubleshooting, network basics, programming assist.

entries.title: CMF 91 — Maintenance Branch (general)
entries.duties: Ordnance and maintenance: wheeled/track mechanics, armament, munitions, maintenance management.
entries.assist: Fill in for 91-series — fault diagnosis, PMCS, parts ordering, engineering depth.

entries.title: Nuclear Power (general)
entries.duties: Nuclear-trained operators and technicians — reactor watchstanding, propulsion, strict procedural compliance.
entries.assist: Educational overview of nuclear Navy roles and procedural discipline — not reactor operating orders.

entries.title: Pilot (rated officer overview)
entries.duties: Fly assigned aircraft; mission planning; crew resource management; regulations compliance.
entries.assist: Educational assist on aircrew coordination, mission planning outline — not flight orders.

entries.title: Judge Advocate (legal overview)
entries.duties: Military justice; legal assistance; operational law; LOAC advice to commanders.
entries.assist: Educational LOAC and military justice overview via warfare/legal corpora — not legal advice.
